raw.subject: Something I noticed about Swiss Pastry Shop
raw.body:
Hi,

Your post about the Fort Worth Swiss community caught my eye. I love the heritage that comes through in your Black Forest Meringue Cake and the fact that you're a local favorite.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers searching for hours of operation and menus on other platforms.

I sketched a page idea from what you post on Facebook, with a menu hero, hours block, and a photo gallery showcasing your Black Forest Meringue Cake. You can see it here:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/swiss-pastry-shop-fort-worth

If you're interested in building out a simple site that showcases your Fort Worth charm and menu offerings, we can discuss a flat fee for local businesses. Please reply or let's schedule a quick call to discuss further.
